# Changelog entry template

Copy into `docs/req/<area>-requirements-changelog.md` (newest entry at the top).

This file holds **pending** requirement changes. After implementation is merged, the developer **removes** the entry so the changelog does not grow. History remains in git.

---

## YYYY-MM-DD — `<short title>`

### Why

`<Optional. Why this change was made.>`

### Requirements touched

| REQ           | Action                                   |
| ------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `REQ-XXX-NNN` | **New** — `<one line>`                   |
| `REQ-XXX-NNN` | **Updated** — `<what changed vs before>` |

### Behavior delta

`<Difference from previous behavior. Before/After bullets, or short list for new REQs. No copy-paste from REQ.>`

### Relates

`<Optional. Only when another area is involved.>`

- `docs/req/<other-area>-requirements-changelog.md` — `<same date — title>`

---
